arguments.command: which llvm-symbolizer addr2line llvm-addr2line 2>/dev/null; dpkg -l | grep -E 'llvm|binutils' 2>/dev/null | head -5

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command:
# Try downloading debug symbols from Microsoft symbol server using the BuildId
BUILDID="4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801"

# Try ELF debug symbols format
curl -sS -L -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/_.debug/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/_.debug"
echo ""
curl -sS -L -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libcoreclr.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libcoreclr.so"
echo ""
# Also try the debuginfod approach
curl -sS -L -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libcoreclr.so/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/libcoreclr.so"
echo ""
arguments.description: Check Microsoft symbol server for debug symbols

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Check Microsoft symbol server for debug symbols

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to symbolicate the .NET runtime frames in this tombstone. The key frames are from `libcoreclr.so` with BuildId `4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801`.

To symbolicate these frames, I need to:
1. Find the debug symbols for this specific build of `libcoreclr.so`
2. Use the BuildId to locate the correct symbol file
3. Use a tool like `llvm-symbolizer` or `addr2line` to resolve the addresses

The BuildId is `4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801`. This is a .NET runtime library, so the symbols might be available from Microsoft's symbol server.


Microsoft publishes .NET runtime symbols on their symbol server, and I can construct a lookup path using the BuildId to fetch the debug information file for this specific build of libcoreclr.so. I'll try constructing the full symbol server URLs with the complete BuildId and attempt to fetch the symbols using available tools like `dotnet-symbol` or `llvm-symbolizer`.

arguments.command: which llvm-symbolizer addr2line llvm-addr2line 2>/dev/null; dpkg -l | grep -E 'llvm|binutils' 2>/dev/null | head -5
